description: Create the backend voice transcription endpoint. Build the FastAPI backend structure from scratch (app/ directory with routers, config, main.py) and implement POST /voice/transcribe that accepts multipart audio, validates it, and sends to OpenAI Whisper API for transcription. Register the voice router in main.py. Create .env.example and requirements.txt. Add config.py with OPENAI_WHISPER_KEY. Follow RULES.md strictly: auth middleware, rate limiting (30/min), type hints on every function, logging (no print), error handling, Pydantic validation.
steps: Create app/config.py with pydantic-settings BaseSettings class loading from .env: OPENAI_WHISPER_KEY (str, default empty), plus any other base config (APP_NAME, DEBUG, etc). Use proper type hints.

Create app/routers/voice.py with APIRouter prefix /voice. Implement POST /transcribe endpoint: accept UploadFile, validate file size (max 25MB constant), validate audio format (m4a, mp3, wav, webm, ogg), read file content, send to OpenAI Whisper API (POST https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions with model whisper-1, response_format json, language en), return {transcript: str, duration: float, language: str}. If no OPENAI_WHISPER_KEY configured, try user BYOK key (placeholder logic for getting from api_keys table). If no key at all, return 400. Use httpx for the OpenAI call. Add rate limit decorator/dependency (30 per minute). Add auth dependency. Use logging module throughout. All functions have type hints. Error handling with try/except returning proper HTTP errors.
Create app/middleware/auth.py with a get_current_user dependency that verifies JWT from Authorization header (placeholder that extracts and validates token structure). Return user dict with user_id.

Create app/middleware/rate_limit.py with a rate limiter dependency (can be a simple in-memory implementation or placeholder that documents Upstash Redis usage). Support configurable limits per endpoint.
Create app/main.py: FastAPI app instance, include voice router with prefix /voice, add CORS middleware, startup/shutdown events if needed. Import and register the router.
Create requirements.txt with: fastapi, uvicorn[standard], httpx, python-multipart, pydantic-settings, python-jose[cryptography], passlib[bcrypt]. Do not add packages already implied.
Run python -m py_compile app/routers/voice.py and python -m py_compile app/main.py to verify Python syntax
acceptance_criteria: app/routers/voice.py exists with POST /transcribe endpoint accepting UploadFile
File size validation (25MB max) and format validation (m4a, mp3, wav, webm, ogg) are implemented
OpenAI Whisper API call is made via httpx with proper auth header
BYOK fallback logic is present when no system key configured
Returns 400 with message 'Add OpenAI API key for voice transcription' when no key available
app/main.py registers voice router at /voice prefix
All Python functions have type hints
No print statements - uses logging module
Auth middleware dependency is applied to the endpoint
requirements.txt contains fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, python-multipart, pydantic-settings
python -m py_compile passes on all .py files
